de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.event

Class ProofSaverEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.util.EventObject
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.event.ProofSaverEvent
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class ProofSaverEvent
extends EventObject
    An event thrown by a ProofSaver.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
